sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports anxiety about recent hepatitis C test results and a history of intermittent tiredness, particularly at the end of the day. He reports a family history of hypertension, diabetes, and depression.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals a two out of six systolic murmur, blood pressure 120/80 mmHg, heart rate 72 bpm, lungs clear to auscultation. Liver and spleen are normal in size.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has hepatitis C, hypertension, diabetes, and a family history of depression. The elevated AST suggests possible liver involvement.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order hepatitis C RNA and HCV genotype testing. Schedule a cervical MRI. Recommend increased oral hydration and slow positional changes for orthostatic symptoms. Offer counseling regarding lifestyle modifications to manage diabetes and depression.
